positive: A stylized, maximalist geometric mural design featuring interconnected flora and fauna. The central motif is a majestic, stylized owl perched among overlapping tropical leaves and mandalas. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep teal, burnt orange, mustard yellow, and cream. The composition should be circular and highly detailed, designed to be printed on fabric. Emphasize bold outlines, clean silhouettes, and intricate patterns that utilize negative space effectively. Mid-century modern aesthetic meets Alphonse Mucha's decorative style. Overhead view, vector graphic quality, high contrast, suitable for repeat pattern print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low contrast, text, logo, watermark, poorly drawn, extra limbs, mutated, noisy, low detail, photo, photorealism, gradients, sketch, monochrome
